title: Issue setting up account in Thunderbird for Android
creator: jameswalker542334
content:
I recently started using Thunderbird for Android and I'm trying to set up my email account, but I'm running into some issues during the configuration process. The app keeps showing a connection or configuration error when I try to add my account.

I checked my incoming and outgoing server settings and they seem correct, but the problem still appears. I'm not sure if this could be related to security settings, server configuration, or something specific to the Android version of Thunderbird.

While searching for possible solutions, I found a guide that explains some common email setup and connection troubleshooting steps which might be related to this problem. It helped me understand some of the configuration options better: https://usaalarmservice.com/ Has anyone else experienced this issue with Thunderbird for Android? Any suggestions on how to properly configure the account or fix this connection error would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.
